title: `bud with --cpu-shares` is failing for `testing-farm`
body:
### Issue Description

All `testing-farm` is failing for test `bud with --cpu-shares`

Output

```
not ok 395 bud with --cpu-shares
# (from function `assert' in file /usr/share/buildah/test/system/helpers.bash, line 538,
#  from function `expect_output' in file /usr/share/buildah/test/system/helpers.bash, line 565,
#  in test file /usr/share/buildah/test/system/bud.bats, line 6455)
#   `expect_output --from="${lines[2]}" "${expect}"' failed
# /usr/share/buildah/test/system /var/ARTIFACTS/work-planssrowxozf/plans/discover/default-0/tests/tests/tmt
# # [checking for: docker.io/library/alpine]
# # [restoring from cache: /var/tmp/bats-run-5o6L1T/suite/buildah-image-cache / docker.io/library/alpine]
# Getting image source signatures
# Copying blob sha256:9d16cba9fb961d1aafec9542f2bf7cb64acfc55245f9e4eb5abecd4cdc38d749

# weight 745
# COMMIT testcpu

# Copying config sha256:b687cdf2529325f769eec70c01bdca10cbd458511c47fdac11c085971b25291f
# Writing manifest to image destination

# Successfully tagged localhost/testcpu:latest
# b687cdf2529325f769eec70c01bdca10cbd458511c47fdac11c085971b25291f
```
